subject: session date
fact: The session was a Dungeons & Dragons tabletop roleplaying game session.
source_quote: The session was a Dungeons & Dragons tabletop roleplaying game session

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis served as the Dungeon Master for the session.
source_quote: run by Kostadis as Dungeon Master

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy played the character Zenvon.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Phandalin
fact: The session took place in the town of Phandalin.
source_quote: set in the town of Phandalin

subject: Stonehill Tavern
fact: The party gathered critical intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: The party gathered critical intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is a patron who was captured.
source_quote: their patron, Gundren, who had been captured

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands gang was identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: The Red Brands gang was identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands.
source_quote: with a leader named Glasstaff

subject: obelisk mystery
fact: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread.
source_quote: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread

subject: goblin ambush
fact: The party successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave.
source_quote: The party successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave

subject: cave scouting
fact: The party began scouting the cave interior.
source_quote: then began scouting the cave interior

subject: snake encounter
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave.
source_quote: Zenvon coming face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen Stonehill is the broad-shouldered young human owner of the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Toblen Stonehill, the broad-shouldered young human owner of the tavern

subject: Gundren
fact: Toblen described Gundren as a merchant who brought good business to the town.
source_quote: Toblen described Gundren as a merchant who brought good business to the town

subject: Tell Dendar
fact: Tell Dendar was a man killed by the Red Brands in broad daylight.
source_quote: the Red Brands had killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight

subject: Tell Dendar's family disappearance
fact: The wife and children of Tell Dendar vanished after his death.
source_quote: after which the man's wife and children vanished

subject: Sleeping Giant tap house
fact: The Sleeping Giant tap house is located on Phandalin's Main Street.
source_quote: located on Phandalin's Main Street

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands drink at the Sleeping Giant tap house.
source_quote: the Red Brands drink at the Sleeping Giant tap house

subject: Elsa
fact: Elsa is a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Elsa, a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Elsa's sister
fact: Elsa's sister is a scholar in Neverwinter.
source_quote: her sister is a scholar in Neverwinter

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra is a party NPC.
source_quote: Veyra (party NPC)

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss is a mentor to Veyra.
source_quote: her mentor, Professor Orryn Voss

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss had disappeared in Phandalin.
source_quote: Professor Orryn Voss had disappeared in Phandalin

subject: black stone fragments
fact: Professor Orryn Voss came to Phandalin believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk.
source_quote: believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk

subject: blue candle
fact: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic.
source_quote: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic

subject: Pip
fact: Pip is a party NPC.
source_quote: Party NPC Pip

subject: Pip's whisper
fact: Pip mentioned hearing a whisper saying 'returned'.
source_quote: Pip mentioned hearing a whisper saying 'returned'

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol.
source_quote: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is the orchard keeper and a retired adventurer.
source_quote: Daran Edermath, the orchard keeper and retired adventurer

subject: Edermath Orchard
fact: Daran Edermath is located at Edermath Orchard.
source_quote: Daran Edermath at Edermath Orchard

subject: Freda
fact: Freda is a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles.
source_quote: Freda, a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles

subject: Freda
fact: Freda stated she knew the Red Brands were behind Gundren's disappearance.
source_quote: She stated she knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance — the Red Brands gang

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands bother everyone in town except Halia.
source_quote: the Red Brands bother everyone in town except Halia

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck is Toblen's nine-year-old son.
source_quote: Tuck, Toblen's nine-year-old son

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf is a friend of Tuck.
source_quote: his friend Carp Alderleaf

subject: tunnel discovery
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a tunnel leading into the woods.
source_quote: Carp Alderleaf had discovered a tunnel leading into the woods

subject: Carp's near capture
fact: The Red Brands nearly caught Carp Alderleaf near the tunnel.
source_quote: the Red Brands (referred to as 'red cloaks') had nearly caught him

subject: Tuck's offer
fact: Tuck offered to show the party where the tunnel is.
source_quote: Tuck offered to show the party where the tunnel is

subject: Narth
fact: Narth is an older weathered human man.
source_quote: Narth, an older weathered human man

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele returned to town limping and pale.
source_quote: Sister Garaele had returned to town limping and pale

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele refused to explain what had happened to her.
source_quote: refused to explain what had happened

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar is a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard.
source_quote: Lenar, a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard

subject: Harbin Wester
fact: Harbin Wester is the town master of Phandalin.
source_quote: Harbin Wester, the town master

subject: Harbin Wester
fact: Lenar identified Harbin Wester as a useless town master who hides behind notices and wax seals.
source_quote: the useless town master who hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old who formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast.
source_quote: The party visited Daran Edermath, a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old who formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast.

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party and praised Pip's dedication to doing good.
source_quote: Daran expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party and praised Pip's dedication to doing good.

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath confirmed concern about the Red Brands and stated that someone needs to confront their leader, Glasstaff.
source_quote: Daran confirmed concern about the Red Brands and stated that someone needs to confront their leader, Glasstaff.

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: Daran revealed that the Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands.
source_quote: confront their leader, Glasstaff

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor is a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant.
source_quote: Tresendar Manor, a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands are at Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: Daran estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands at Tresendar Manor

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Old Owl Well is an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril.
source_quote: He identified Old Owl Well as an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril

subject: Old Owl Well quest
fact: Prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from Old Owl Well by undead creatures.
source_quote: prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from the ruins known as Old Owl Well by undead creatures

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath offered boots of striding and springing as a reward for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: Daran offered boots of striding and springing as a reward for investigating Old Owl Well

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests.
source_quote: Daran urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: The Shrine of Luck is Phandalin's only temple and is dedicated to Tymora.
source_quote: Phandalin's only temple, the Shrine of Luck, dedicated to Tymora

subject: Tymora
fact: Tymora is the god of good luck and fortune.
source_quote: Tymora, the god of good luck and fortune

subject: Shrine of Luck acolyte
fact: The shrine is tended by a zealous young elf acolyte.
source_quote: tended by a zealous young elf acolyte

subject: Shrine of Luck acolyte
fact: The acolyte recognized the party as those searching for Gundren.
source_quote: recognized the party as those searching for Gundren

subject: Shrine of Luck acolyte
fact: The acolyte blessed the party.
source_quote: The acolyte blessed the party

subject: Shrine of Luck acolyte
fact: The acolyte indicated she had another quest for the party upon their return but would not assign it until Gundren's situation was resolved.
source_quote: indicated she had another quest for them upon their return, but would not assign it until Gundren's situation was resolved

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is currently being held captive by goblins.
source_quote: the cave where Gundren is believed to be held

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren's captors are extracting information from him.
source_quote: his captors are extracting information from him

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren's captors may decide to kill him once they have the information they need.
source_quote: may decide to kill him once they have what they need

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw of DC 10.
source_quote: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw (DC 10)

subject: Pip
fact: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare and was suspended 10 feet above the ground.
source_quote: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare and was suspended 10 feet above the ground

subject: Pip rescue
fact: The party lowered Pip from the snare without requiring a roll.
source_quote: The party lowered him without requiring a roll

subject: Goblin Cave
fact: The cave entrance is a hillside cave with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets.
source_quote: described as a hillside cave with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon scouted ahead using stealth and rolled successfully.
source_quote: Zenvon scout ahead using stealth (rolled successfully)

subject: Goblin lookout
fact: Zenvon spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets

subject: Goblin lookout
fact: The guards were bored and inattentive.
source_quote: The guards were bored and inattentive

subject: Surprise ambush
fact: The party successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round.
source_quote: The party successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round

subject: Combat initiative
fact: Initiative was rolled and goblins rolled 21 but were surprised, granting the party a free first round.
source_quote: goblins rolled 21 but were surprised, granting the party a free first round

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot by rolling a natural 1 in the surprise round.
source_quote: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot (rolled a natural 1) in the surprise round

subject: Pip
fact: Pip charged in but his attacks did not connect in the first round.
source_quote: Pip charged in but his attacks did not connect in the first round

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela's Sacred Flame missed.
source_quote: Sister Maela's Sacred Flame missed

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage

subject: Goblin boss
fact: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed.
source_quote: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright in a decisive strike.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright in a decisive strike

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin for 5 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin (5 points of damage)

subject: Goblin boss
fact: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times.
source_quote: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon missed with a dagger but hit with a short sword for 9 points of damage.
source_quote: Zenvon missed with a dagger but hit with a short sword (9 points of damage)

subject: Pip
fact: Pip missed his attack.
source_quote: Pip missed his attack

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela hit the boss with her mace for 6 points of damage.
source_quote: Sister Maela hit the boss with her mace for 6 points of damage

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss.
source_quote: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss

subject: Combat loot
fact: Looting the bodies yielded no coins but produced a scimitar and a javelin.
source_quote: Looting the bodies yielded no coins but produced a scimitar and a javelin

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon added the scimitar and javelin to his inventory.
source_quote: which Zenvon added to his inventory

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected

subject: Main passage
fact: A main passage deeper into the cave required either darkvision or a light source to navigate.
source_quote: A main passage deeper into the cave was identified, but it required either darkvision or a light source to navigate

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela is a dwarf and has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra is a tiefling and has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: Veyra's blue candle
fact: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth.
source_quote: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth

subject: Giant poisonous snake
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.
source_quote: he came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon had a stealth roll of 23, so the snake had not yet noticed him.
source_quote: Thanks to his stealth roll of 23, the snake had not yet noticed him

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party.
source_quote: Decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party

subject: Goblin Cave exploration
fact: The session ended with Zenvon retreating silently from the snake.
source_quote: ending the session on the cliffhanger

subject: Gundren's rescue
fact: Multiple NPCs warned that Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him.
source_quote: Multiple NPCs warned that Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon lacks darkvision.
source_quote: Zenvon (halfling) lacks darkvision

fact: Using a light source will eliminate stealth.

fact: The party must coordinate with Sister Maela for navigation in dark areas.

fact: The party must coordinate with Veyra for navigation in dark areas.
source_quote: The party must coordinate around Sister Maela and Veyra for navigation in dark areas

fact: A giant snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave.

fact: The party has not yet engaged the giant snake.
source_quote: the party has not yet engaged it

subject: wolves
fact: Three wolves were spotted chained inside the cave.

fact: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin.

fact: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded.

fact: Sister Garaele is not speaking about what happened to her.
source_quote: not speaking about what happened

fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.

fact: Halia has not been visited yet.

fact: Halia's relationship with the Red Brands is unclear.

fact: The threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger.

fact: Rescuing Gundren from the goblin cave is the primary objective.

fact: Investigating Halia's connection to the Red Brands is deferred until after the rescue.

fact: The party is to return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren to receive the next quest.

fact: Old Owl Well has an undead threat.
